summary: Tested Security PIN feature end-to-end. All 25 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_pin_security.py pass against the preview URL. Frontend PinCard renders on /account (Security tab) with the required testids, status flips Not-set -> Configured, Set-PIN dialog works, and password+digit validation drives the submit-button disabled state.

ui_bugs.issue: Input has HTML maxLength={6}. If a user PASTES (or Playwright calls .fill with) a string that contains non-digits (e.g. 'abc12a3456'), the browser truncates the native value to 6 chars BEFORE the onChange non-digit stripper runs, so the user ends up with '12' instead of '123456'. Keystroke-by-keystroke digit entry is unaffected. Low user impact (PINs are numeric by convention), but worth fixing by removing maxLength and relying on the JS .replace+.slice pipeline, or by switching to onBeforeInput to reject non-digits.

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW: Remove maxLength={6} from <Input> inside PinField (src/pages/account/PinCard.jsx) so pasted values go through the non-digit stripper before being clipped to 6. Alternatively use onBeforeInput to block non-digit keys so native maxLength is safe.

NON-BUG NOTE for backend test runners: /app/backend/tests/test_pin_security.py requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to be exported (otherwise it falls back to http://localhost:8001 where Secure cookies are not sent and every request 401s). Confirmed passing when the env var is set.
critical_code_review_comments: router.py PIN endpoints correctly exclude pin_hash / pin value from every response body (verified by test_pin_never_echoed_in_responses).
Lockout logic in verify_pin is clean: counters increment on 401, 423 on threshold, correct-pin-while-locked still returns 423, reset_pin clears both counter and locked_until.
reset_pin relies on require_reauth which raises 401 'Re-authentication required for this action.' — matches ReauthProvider's interceptor detail string; verified.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (renders + create-dialog validated; maxLength paste edge case noted)

test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 ; throwaway staff pintest_541f06@ccms.app / Pinui_541f06Strong!A1 created for UI test.
seed_data_creation: One throwaway staff user created via POST /api/auth/users for UI walkthrough; pytest creates its own per-test staff users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: pytest must be invoked with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported, otherwise Secure cookies are dropped on localhost and tests see 401. Frontend route for the Security tab is /account (not /account/security). PinCard lives in /app/frontend/src/pages/account/PinCard.jsx and is wired between MFA and Recent sign-ins inside /app/frontend/src/pages/account/SecurityTab.jsx via the main /app/frontend/src/pages/Security.jsx shell.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bug. The maxLength+paste interaction is a cosmetic input-UX edge case, not a security/correctness issue (backend rejects anything that isn't exactly 6 digits).
